description_long: This combat tactical vehicle is a tracked, armored machine equipped with a prominent multi-barrel rocket launcher system mounted on its roof. The vehicle features a robust, angular body with heavy-duty treads for traversing rough urban terrain, and its exterior is finished in a dark, glossy color. The front section includes a reinforced bumper and what appears to be a small, remotely operated turret or sensor system. Along the sides, there are visible mechanical arms or robotic appendages, possibly for manipulation or defense. The roof-mounted launcher is loaded with multiple cylindrical projectiles, each capped in alternating red, white, and blue colors, suggesting a modular or reloadable design. The vehicle's overall construction emphasizes durability, firepower, and versatility for urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a multi-barrel rocket launcher on its roof and robotic arms on the sides, finished in a dark, glossy color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reinforced bumper, central turret or sensor, and the full array of roof-mounted rockets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tracked undercarriage, side-mounted robotic arm, and the length of the rocket launcher.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the rocket launcher and the symmetry of the vehicle's design.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the opposite robotic arm and the vehicle's robust track system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large multi-barrel rocket launcher on the roof; small turret or sensor system at the front; robotic arms on both sides.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, angular panels covering all sides; reinforced front bumper; no visible reactive or modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; vehicle is finished in a solid dark color with colored rocket tips.
attribute_tire_type: Not applicable; vehicle uses continuous tracks.
